channel.title: Competitive-Programming on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Competitive-Programming on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #2-ex: Möbius Practice — LCM Sums, Divisor-Count, Omega Numbers
item.description: Practice problems for Möbius inversion: LCMSUM, two-variable lcm sum (O(n^3/4)), FSF’s game with offline difference, divisor-count sum d(ij), Omega Numbers with Dirichlet suffix sum.
